description: You are setting up a BCI experiment to detect SSVEP signals from the visual cortex using a 4-channel OpenBCI Ganglion board. Start a session using the 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' data source configured for a 4-channel Ganglion board. Reconfigure the Head Plot widget by remapping the four channels to the 10-20 system locations O1, O2, P3, and P4 respectively. The Head Plot visualization should reflect these posterior electrode positions.
